notes: Calm run 2.5h after the 16:00 run (which resolved both high-severity coverage-audit gaps: FIFA WC later rounds + F1 dating). Board already well-covered, so this was a focused pass. Fanned out an athletics scout, a late-additions/schedule-change scout, and an independent fact-checker.

ADDED (1): NM friidrett 2026 (Norwegian Athletics Championships), Trondheim Stadion, 23-25 July, on NRK. The one item the previous run flagged as 'just outside the 2-week window, add next run'. Dates + venue + NRK broadcast triple-confirmed (nmfriidrett2026.no + no.wikipedia + NRK's 2026 athletics programme) by the scout AND an independent fresh-context fact-checker (verdict: confirmed). Exact daily start times are NOT yet published — event time set to day 1 (Thu 23 July) as a provisional day-level start; summary says so. Star participation (Warholm/Ingebrigtsen/Skotheim) NOT yet confirmed (start lists drop closer). Confidence high on existence/dates/venue/broadcaster.

NO OTHER CONFIRMED EVENTS. Casper Ruud: no confirmed North American hardcourt entry (Washington ~25 July / Montreal 1-13 Aug) — Gstaad (13-19 July) stays his only confirmed near-term event; US swing still injury-dependent. Kristoffer Ventura: only an ALTERNATE on the 3M Open (20-26 July), not in the field; Corales Puntacana unconfirmed too — no event added. Magnus Carlsen: no new July/early-Aug tournament (next remains Esports World Cup chess 11-15 Aug). 100 Thieves/rain: BLAST Bounty S2 online stage (21-26 July) stands; bracket/match times still unpublished (drop 1-3 days before).

WATCH ITEMS (for verify/scout): (1) Jakob Ingebrigtsen comeback still UNCONFIRMED (Achilles surgery Feb 2026; agent says possible return from mid-July). Off-board candidate is the Hungarian Athletics Grand Prix, Budapest 14 July — NOT added (no confirmed entry). Monaco (10 July) + London (18 July) already on the board. (2) 100 Thieves possible Malta LAN block 30 July-2 Aug IF they advance from the online stage.

TdF stage 4 (Tue 7 July, Carcassonne-Foix): NO confirmed time change. Caution flagged by the scout — some US aggregators show '7:10 a.m.' which is Eastern Time, NOT local start (~13:25 CEST). Stage runs under a Code Red heat alert (~40-41C) and is at genuine risk (UCI heat protocol on standby), but no official change as of 6 July evening. Stage 3 (6 July) ran spectator-free on the final ~40 km due to wildfire. VERIFY MUST recheck stage 4 the morning of 7 July.

Dismissed noise: coverage-gaps.json (17:41) had one non-imminent PL entity gap (Glasner -> Nottingham Forest, a coaching headline) and two low-severity file-empty anomalies (chess.json + esports.json empty — off-season / event-driven static fetchers; Sjakk-NM and BLAST are ai-research and on the board). scout-log: 21x 'quiet' over the last day. coverage-audit.json is from 08:24 (predates the 16:00 run that already resolved both its gaps).

BLOCKED (3rd run running): the intended norwegian-rights/SKILL.md edit (add Athletics/Diamond League -> NRK 2025-2029 + NM friidrett -> NRK; refresh F1 to Viaplay/V Sport 1 through 2029 and TdF to shared TV 2 Play + Max/Eurosport) was DENIED by permission-mode when writing to .claude/skills/. OPS RECOMMENDATION: grant the research workflow write access to .claude/skills/ so the qualitative learning loop can persist.

Grader: self-graded pass (92). Streaming filled on the new event (NRK); confidence rules respected (high with 3 evidence URLs); no static events removed; dedupe checked (no existing NM friidrett event). One honest caveat logged: the NM daily start times are provisional pending the Dagsprogram.
